'''Kartha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Pulsar (DP20 gunship)|''Pulsar'']] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and served under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
